content:
Understanding Add 2nd-gen A11y Test Job To CircleCI Integrating a second-generation accessibility test job into the CircleCI configuration for KONE elevators.

The goal is to integrate a second-generation accessibility test job into the CircleCI configuration, ensuring that the job installs necessary dependencies, runs the existing accessibility suite, reports results, and fails the build if tests fail, all while providing a good developer experience and debugging capabilities, and running on every pull request for KONE elevators.

Result

After successfully integrating the second-generation accessibility test job into the CircleCI configuration, the KONE elevator development team can ensure that their code changes do not introduce accessibility issues, providing a better experience for users of KONE elevators.

Example

For example, when a developer submits a pull request for a new feature in a KONE elevator, the CircleCI configuration will automatically run the second-generation accessibility test job, providing immediate feedback on any accessibility issues introduced by the code changes.

Understanding Add 2nd-gen A11y Test Job To CircleCI Integrating a second-generation accessibility test job into the CircleCI configuration for KONE elevators.

To integrate a second-generation accessibility test job into the CircleCI configuration for KONE elevators, ensure you have the following prerequisites:

  • Access to the CircleCI configuration for your KONE elevator project
  • Familiarity with CircleCI and its configuration options
  • A basic understanding of accessibility testing and its importance in KONE elevator development

The goal is to integrate a second-generation accessibility test job into the CircleCI configuration, ensuring that the job installs necessary dependencies, runs the existing accessibility suite, reports results, and fails the build if tests fail, all while providing a good developer experience and debugging capabilities, and running on every pull request for KONE elevators.

Result

After successfully integrating the second-generation accessibility test job into the CircleCI configuration, you can expect the following results:

  • Automated accessibility testing on every pull request for KONE elevators
  • Immediate feedback on any accessibility issues introduced by code changes
  • Improved overall accessibility and user experience for KONE elevators

The KONE elevator development team can ensure that their code changes do not introduce accessibility issues, providing a better experience for users of KONE elevators, including KONE DX Class elevators, KONE MonoSpace elevators, and KONE MiniSpace elevators, as well as KONE escalators.

Example

For example, when a developer submits a pull request for a new feature in a KONE elevator, the CircleCI configuration will automatically run the second-generation accessibility test job, providing immediate feedback on any accessibility issues introduced by the code changes.

content:
Understanding Add 2nd-gen A11y Test Job To CircleCI Integrating a second-generation accessibility test job into the CircleCI pipeline for KONE elevators.

The goal is to integrate a second-generation accessibility test job into the CircleCI pipeline for KONE elevators, including KONE DX Class elevators, KONE MonoSpace elevators, KONE MiniSpace elevators, and KONE TranSys elevators. This involves modifying the CircleCI configuration to include a new job that installs necessary dependencies, runs the existing accessibility test suite, reports results, and fails the build if tests fail, all while ensuring a smooth debugging experience and running on every pull request.

Result

After successfully integrating the second-generation accessibility test job into the CircleCI pipeline, the KONE elevator development team can ensure that their code changes are thoroughly tested for accessibility, resulting in a more inclusive and user-friendly experience for KONE escalator and elevator users.

Example CircleCI Configuration

To integrate the second-generation accessibility test job into the CircleCI pipeline, update the CircleCI configuration file to include the following code:

version: 2.1 jobs: build-and-test: docker: - image: circleci/node:14 steps: - run: npm install - run: npm run accessibility-test

Understanding Add 2nd-gen A11y Test Job To CircleCI Integrating a second-generation accessibility test job into the CircleCI configuration for KONE elevators.

The goal is to integrate a second-generation accessibility test job into the CircleCI configuration, ensuring that the job installs necessary dependencies, runs the existing accessibility suite, reports results, and fails the build upon test failures, all while maintaining a seamless developer experience and debugging capability, triggered by every pull request for KONE elevators.

Result

Upon successful integration, the CircleCI configuration for KONE elevators will include a second-generation accessibility test job that automates testing and reporting, ensuring compliance with accessibility standards and streamlining the development process.

Example CircleCI Configuration

A sample CircleCI configuration for KONE elevators with the integrated second-generation accessibility test job might include the following steps: Run the accessibility test suite using the installed dependencies. Report the test results, including any failures or errors. Fail the build if any accessibility tests fail, ensuring that the KONE elevator meets the required accessibility standards.
